extract: Pal Park (Japanese: パルパーク Pal Park) is a special Pokémon preserve present in the five Generation IV core series games, located at the east end of Route 221 in Sinnoh and in Fuchsia City in place of the Safari Zone in Kanto. In Kanto, after the warden closed the Safari Zone, his son opened Pal Park in its place. According to Professor Oak, Pal Park attracts Pokémon from other regions. In Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl, Pal Park is replaced with Ramanas Park.
